meaning: n.葡萄藤,葡萄树,<美俗>(秘密情报或)谣言不胫而走
examples: I heard on the grapevine that you're leaving.
No sooner had he reached the grapevine than--crack!
I had heard through the grapevine that he was quite critical of what we were doing.
The videos throughout this post show an inside look at what happens inside the Grapevine facility.
Thanks to the Internet, it's like the grapevine just got a healthy dose of Miracle-Gro.
